Ecom Targets
The Challenger Series
THE TARGETS
There are FIVE targets to hit - get all five and you'll receive a raving testimonial from
Cat and an FATC e-Commerce certification badge!
All must be for an ecom campaign, please provide screenshots showing so.
The targets are:
1. Achieve a 2% Link CTR to cold audience targeting - on Facebook newsfeed
placement with minimum 2,000 impressions (please take screenshot showing
placement segmentation by going to breakdowns, then By Delivery, then
placements) and also include targeting
2. Achieve a 4% Link CTR to warm/retargeting audience - must have at least
1,000 impressions, please include impressions in screenshot
3. Achieve a 4X ROA across entire funnel - must be more than 5 sales, please
show screenshot of all campaigns in account
4. Achieve a relevancy score of 10 - must have spent at least $50 on one ad,
please include spend in screenshot This challenge is not relevant anymore. We
are working on setting up a new challenge.
5. Achieve 100% scale on purchases in one ad set in two-week timeframe
(original ad spend minimum $50/day) - please included screenshot of before and
after (e.g. on the 1st you spent $50 and had 5 purchases (cost per purchase of
$10/purchase), you scale your budget to $100 per day by the 14th, and need to
have 10 purchases or more (keeping cost per purchase at $10 or less).
Complete
Great Job! Keep Going!
